# pambrose-claude-plugins

> Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by pambrose.

This repository is a Claude Code plugin marketplace. Each top-level directory is an independent plugin, and `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` is the marketplace manifest.

## Plugins

### linear-issue-integration (v1.7.0)

Find Linear issues, fix them autonomously in isolated worktrees, and request Codex CLI reviews.

**Commands:**
- `/fix-linear-issue` — Fix a Linear issue in an isolated worktree
- `/show-linear-issues` — Display Linear issues in "Todo" status sorted by priority
- `/cancel-linear-issue` — Cancel Linear issues by setting status to Cancelled
- `/codex-review` — Ask Codex CLI to independently review a Linear issue
- `/linear-plugin-version` — Show installed plugin version

**Skills:**
- `create-linear-bug-issues` — Review codebase for bugs and create Linear issues
- `create-linear-design-issues` — Review codebase for design problems and create Linear issues
- `create-linear-idiom-issues` — Review codebase for non-idiomatic code and create Linear issues

**Agents:**
- `issue-fixer` — Autonomous agent that fixes Linear issues in isolated worktrees

### ide-integration (v1.6.0)

Open IDEs and tools directly from Claude Code.

**Commands:**
- `/claude` — Open Claude desktop app
- `/codex` — Open Codex editor
- `/cursor` — Open Cursor editor
- `/vscode` — Open Visual Studio Code
- `/intellij` — Open IntelliJ IDEA
- `/pycharm` — Open PyCharm
- `/clion` — Open CLion
- `/rustrover` — Open RustRover
- `/datagrip` — Open DataGrip
- `/zed` — Open Zed editor
- `/warp` — Open Warp terminal
- `/ghostty` — Open Ghostty terminal
- `/terminal` — Open macOS Terminal
- `/finder` — Open macOS Finder
- `/open-github` — Open current repo on GitHub
- `/open-gitlab` — Open current repo on GitLab

### osx-integration (v0.4.0)

macOS system integration — clipboard, notifications, text-to-speech, screenshots, and phone dialing.

**Commands:**
- `/clipboard` — Read from or write to the macOS clipboard
- `/dial` — Look up a contact in macOS Contacts and dial via Continuity/FaceTime
- `/notify` — Send a macOS desktop notification
- `/say` — Speak text aloud using macOS text-to-speech
- `/screenshot` — Take a screenshot

## Structure

```
pambrose-claude-plugins/
├── .claude-plugin/
│   └── marketplace.json
├── linear-issue-integration/
│   ├── .claude-plugin/plugin.json
│   ├── commands/
│   ├── agents/
│   └── skills/
├── ide-integration/
│   ├── .claude-plugin/plugin.json
│   └── commands/
├── osx-integration/
│   ├── .claude-plugin/plugin.json
│   └── commands/
├── CLAUDE.md
└── llms.txt
```

## Installation

Install via Claude Code:

```
claude install-plugin https://github.com/pambrose/pambrose-claude-plugins
```
